zh.Old Malton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓
zh.Stokesley, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯托可斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Eure於1425年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir William Eure39歲，母親Maude FitzHugh31歲。他於大約1460年與Ellen Ingleby結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年12月20日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Eure于1425年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir William Eure39岁，母亲Maude FitzHugh31岁。他于大约1460年与Ellen Ingleby结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1472年12月20日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Eure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ewer
meanings: English (Hertfordshire, Middlesex, and Buckinghamshire): occupational name from Middle English ewere, a shortened form of ewerer ‘servant who supplied guests at the table with water to wash their hands’. The word ewerer is itself a derivative of Old French and Middle English ewer ‘water pitcher’, also recorded in Middle English as ower. Compare Lower .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Eure was born in 1425, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William Eure, was 39 and his mother, Maude FitzHugh, was 31. He married Ellen Ingleby about 1460. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died before 20 December 1472, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Eure est né en 1425, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Eure, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Maude FitzHugh, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Ingleby environ 1460. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 20 décembre 1472, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Eure 1425 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Eure 39 und seine Mutter Maude FitzHugh 31. Er hat um 1460 Ellen Ingleby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 20. Dezember 1472 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Eure è nato il nel 1425 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Eure, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Maude FitzHugh, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Ingleby circa 1460. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì prima del 20 dicembre 1472, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Eureが1425年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Eureは39歳，母Maude FitzHughは31歳であった。約1460年にEllen Inglebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1472年12月20日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Eure(이)가 1425년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Eure(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude FitzHugh(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1460년 Ellen Ingleby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 12월 20일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Eure nasceu em 1425, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Eure, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Maude FitzHugh, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Ingleby aproximadamente 1460. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 20 de dezembro de 1472, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Eure родился в 1425 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Eure было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude FitzHugh, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Ingleby около 1460 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер перед 20 декабрь 1472 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Eure nació en 1425, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Eure, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Maude FitzHugh, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Ellen Ingleby aproximadamente 1460. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió antes de 20 de diciembre de 1472, en su pueblo.
